Print Sheet: Retainer : Achyut (Itarajana Mage) [F1- True Magick, Lore]

AI - "Elder Toreador + Prestigious Sire"  Child of Mouqi the Dancer
Child of Ragnor the Northman
Child of Rafael de Corazón
Child of Callisti y Castillo
Child of Arikel
Stamina - No Wound Pen / Can't be Knocked out/down unless less Ptraits
Influnce "Elite" Real Estate Patron of Arts 1
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
Rite of Katabasis - Takes Target in to the shadowlands for one night, but they must go blinded.
History of The Lineages of Caine
Rite of Mortality - This lets you use one of your DT's to double the use of one of your mortal backgrounds. That mortal Background can not be used the next month.
Rite of the Antediluvians - The target of this (S+Ritae) for 30 days has double their normal clan flaw
Rite of Sak Yant - Marks a New TMR with a hidden BH brand.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows:
Jan was born in poverty in Copenhagen in 1293 his mother was a fish hawker. Poverty was so extreme for his family when the Italian merchant offered to pay for her infant son to come with him and learn the sea trade. She had not even heard what price was offered before she pushed him in to the arms of the Italian Merchant, hoping he did not notice the cough the boy had.
 
The Merchant was a Revenant of the Black Hand getting small children for herds and the Chatterling Core. In giving just small amount of vitae, Jan was cured of his sickness and transported to the land of the dead. He learned to walk in the streets of the city of Caine. All relationships where masters and servants. Food was too valuable to be transported in to Enoch without an extra value. Jan was tested in many ways, magic, combat, even research he fell behind his brothers. while on paper he was a failure where he thrived was conspiracies. He would sneak in to the records and have his fellow trainees be forced to take his times to act as herd for the masters. The other trainees began to feel something was up, and cornered Jan. In the darkened alleys of the dead city Jan was beat to over and over. With his young bones cracking under their blows, he was left as a bloody husk to be devoured by the wraiths who hunted the city. But he was not found by a wraith he was found by Inauhaten the immortal.
 
A boy who had skirted death multiple times, became the attendant for the mummy, finding him his books and gathering his ingredients. Being removed from the vampires of Enoch let Jan grow tall and strong. Decades past as he survived with this elevated status, but soon the sands of time grew weary on him. He was too old for his prime, passing the age for a chatterling embrace by decades. So Jan petitioned the True Brujah for admittance.
 
The council of time fearing Inauhaten's influence in the hand and then in their membership, allowed Jan's entry, if he submitted to be blood bound to the leadership of the True Brujah. Jan went to his mentor for advisement and he was told "All chains erode in age, you just have to survive them". With permission Jan allowed his lifeblood to be taken and fully joined the Dead of the Tal'mahe'Ra.Returning to the world of the living, this time as a member of the dead. He entered the clan of roses. He tried his hand at many arts to find his place, but all things he created felt hollow and dead. The place he first found his path was in the monasteries, copying the words of others took away the need to think of an original concept, and focusing on perfect copies were respected.
 
Cloistered away from society few remarked at Jan’s ageless state, and many Toreadors also came to see his work, as his reputation grew. All did not stay peaceful, the warriors of the reformation came and spoke to the Abbot and demanded the relics of the abbey for destruction. In one night you made replicas of all the relics. In a few hours the reformationists threw on the pyre what they believed to be the bone of St. Jerome, such as all creatures under the sky destroy things of value it’s your place to keep the valuables of the world safe.
 
Monasteries closed you moved in to the cities seeing the treasures bought from the Americas and the East, you became an authenticator and collector for Clan Toreador. With age more responsibilities were foisted upon you, Primigion, Keeper, Even Seneschal where all titles you held at some time. Your reputation as a cool head, and wise council in the clan of the passionate has given you boons near and wide. You have finally taken that step from being the craftsman to the patron. Living simply allows you to invest in others and even investing in failures is a success in making contacts.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

Fake Lintage  Child of Desmond de Montait
Child of Mouqi the Dancer
Child of Ragnor the Northman
Child of Rafael de Corazón
Child of Callisti y Castillo
Child of Arikel

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.
Computers - Investing in protecting my identity by making AI more secure. Having text's of my toreador lintage supported up and down the line.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

Using my Influence, as well as my personal Skills (Academics, Crafts) with appropriate focuses. I want to announce the opening of a Classic Arabic Text Exhibit. I want it to be public enough for a news on the march if I can.

Sending letters to toreador leadership about the questions of non toreador "adoptions" in los angeles, and who might have authorized it. This is an end around to make the idea of non tories in la public and to show i'm being a VERY good torie trying to keep the area clean. (I'm spending a DT because I would like a reply from some torie leadership)
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Using my Mage ally, I'm sending reports on the court to the TMR, and who they want focused on for the good and the bad.
Start sending out feelers of noddist lore to start building a cult. Putting up noddist lore in places to attract people who want to know more and the power that comes from that..

2xp - Science (Museum Curation)
2xp - Contacts (Police Department Video Review, Road Cameras ect)
2xp - Allies (Overly Determined Cultits)
